sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19177" key="*ba/kxeusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Βάκχ-ευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Bacchic revelry,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg017.perseus-grc1:357" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">357</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
